_note: Per-game rates from full human games (kickoff to end). Compare ONLY against full-game-from-kickoff agent eval (tools/eval_game_stats.sh, demo_reset_pct 0) — training dashboards use curriculum starts and are NOT comparable. Human is a PLAUSIBLY-OPTIMAL reference, not a ceiling: a superhuman policy may legitimately diverge on context metrics (fewer/better blocks, more ball security, fewer GFIs).
dodge_success_per_game: ~unknown (dodgeRoll has no success flag in corpus; attempts only)
_handoff_note: measured 2026-06-10 via turnDataSetHandOverUsed=true over 500-replay sample (663 uses); handoff has no thrower roll so the D61 roll-type count missed it
